CREATE TABLE geo_points (lat1 FLOAT64, lon1 FLOAT64, lat2 FLOAT64, lon2 FLOAT64);
SELECT h3PointDistM(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) AS distance FROM geo_points;
SELECT a.lat1, a.lon1, a.lat2, a.lon2, h3PointDistM(a.lat1, a.lon1, b.lat1, b.lon1) AS distance FROM geo_points AS a JOIN geo_points AS b ON a.lat1 != b.lat1;

WITH (SELECT lat1, lon1 FROM geo_points WHERE lat1 > 0) AS point1, (SELECT lat2, lon2 FROM geo_points WHERE lon2 < 0) AS point2 SELECT h3PointDistM(point1.lat1, point1.lon1, point2.lat2, point2.lon2) AS distance FROM point1, point2;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_distances, AVG(h3PointDistM(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2)) AS avg_distance FROM geo_points;
SELECT lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2, h3PointDistM(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) AS distance FROM geo_points WHERE h3PointDistM(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) < 1000000;

SELECT lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2, h3PointDistM(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) AS distance FROM geo_points WHERE lat1 BETWEEN -90 AND 90 AND lon1 BETWEEN -180 AND 180 AND lat2 BETWEEN -90 AND 90 AND lon2 BETWEEN -180 AND 180;
